name: mostSetSBC
title: mostSetSBC
description: This function sets the "Synchronous Bandwidth Control (SBC) Register" of the MOST hardware chip to the given value.
The function is only practically applicable if the hardware connected to the channel is in master mode.
The newly set value is only accepted once a "DeAllocate" message re-releases all synchronous channel assignments.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel of the connected MOST hardware

parameters.name: sbcvalue
parameters.description: New SBC register value. Values between 0 and 15 are permitted.

availability: MOST25 MOST50 MOST150 Not in StopMeasurement
MOST25 MOST50 MOST150 Not in StopMeasurement
